overview: Digital Zindagi is a premium multi-vendor marketplace and professional super-app for India. It includes a full Admin Control Panel, Provider management, Recharge Business System, Offer Portal with 3-tier MLM referral commissions, Udhaar Book, Ludo game, Video Gallery, and a Custom Code Manager for homepage customization — all branded exclusively as Digital Zindagi.
features: 3-tier MLM referral commission system (5%/2%/1%) with Earnings Dashboard
Custom Code Manager with Title/Subtitle fields, compact buttons, and flexible Left/Right/Top/Bottom placement
Grid and stacked layout control for homepage custom code sections
White-label Digital Zindagi branding — all third-party branding removed
Universal real-time sync across Admin Panel, Caffeine preview, and Vercel
Provider registration green screen fix with smooth navigation
Toast notifications for user-friendly error handling
Recharge Business System with wallet and commission engine
Offer Portal with isolated login/signup and earnings dashboard
Ludo game ecosystem with rewards wallet
Multi-role access: Super Admin, Manager, Provider, Customer
